reviews.comment:
Tenés que ir de madrugada para que te atiendan rápido dado el flujo de gente que concurre a dicha estación de servicio.  En temporada alta, de día siempre está concurrida.  El aire para las gomas no te lo cobran.

(Translated by Google)
You have to go in the early morning to get served quickly because of the high volume of people at that gas station. During peak season, it's always busy during the day. They don't charge you for tire inflation.

reviews.comment:
El trato por prte de esta empresa es admirable. A veces tardan un poco pero siempre solucionan los inconvenientes. El servicio de grúa es excelente!!!!! Y el de gomeria la gloria! La verdad que quedarse en la ruta y esperar y volver a andar es lo mejor. Siempre lo empleados bien predispuestos. La verdad para recomendar ser socio

(Translated by Google)
The customer service from this company is admirable. Sometimes they take a while, but they always resolve the issue. The towing service is excellent! And the tire service is heavenly! Honestly, staying on the road, waiting, and then getting back on the road is the best. The employees are always very responsive. I truly recommend becoming a member.
